revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

ロボットによる: 文字置き換え (-[[戦国武将]] +[[武将|戦国武将]])

/* 記念日・年中行事 */内容ついいいか

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月15日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の15日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[慶長]]19年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1614年]][[12月15日]]） - [[大坂の陣#大坂冬の陣|大坂冬の陣]]で[[徳川家康]]軍が[[大坂城]]攻撃に出陣 * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月10日]]） - [[近江屋事件]]にて[[坂本龍馬]]と[[中岡慎太郎]]が襲撃される。龍馬は当日死亡、中岡は事件から3日目に死亡した。 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月15日]]） - 「[[国立銀行条例]]」制定 * 明治5年（グレゴリオ暦1872年12月15日） - [[神武天皇]]即位の年を日本の[[紀元]]（[[神武天皇即位紀元]]）として制定
== 誕生日 == * [[永正]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1507年]][[12月18日]]） - [[大内義隆]]、大名（+ [[1551年]]） * [[寛政]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1798年]][[1月1日]]） - [[歌川国芳]]、[[浮世絵]]師（+ [[1861年]]） * [[文政]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1819年]][[12月31日]]） - [[宮地常磐]]、潮江天満宮神主（+ [[1890年]]） * [[天保]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[1月3日]]） - [[坂本龍馬]]、幕末の志士（+ [[1867年]]） * [[弘化]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1847年]][[12月22日]]） - [[大槻文彦]]、[[国語学]]者『言海』（+ [[1928年]]） * [[文久]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1861年]][[12月16日]]） - [[落合直文]]、[[歌人]]（+ [[1903年]]） * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[12月25日]]） - [[志賀重昂]]、[[地理学]]者・政治家（+ [[1927年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]14年（ユリウス暦[[1586年]][[12月25日]]） - [[吉川元春]]、[[武将|戦国武将]]・[[毛利元就]]の次男（* [[1530年]]） * [[承応]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654年]][[1月3日]]） - [[松永貞徳]]、[[俳諧師]]・古典学者（* [[1571年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月10日]]） - [[坂本龍馬]]、幕末の志士（* [[1836年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == ⒈七五三
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|14|11|16|10|15|12|11|1115}}
[[Category:kk]][[en:11月15日 (旧暦)]][[Category:kk]]

{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月15日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の15日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[慶長]]19年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1614年]][[12月15日]]） - [[大坂の陣#大坂冬の陣|大坂冬の陣]]で[[徳川家康]]軍が[[大坂城]]攻撃に出陣 * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月10日]]） - [[近江屋事件]]にて[[坂本龍馬]]と[[中岡慎太郎]]が襲撃される。龍馬は当日死亡、中岡は事件から3日目に死亡した。 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月15日]]） - 「[[国立銀行条例]]」制定 * 明治5年（グレゴリオ暦1872年12月15日） - [[神武天皇]]即位の年を日本の[[紀元]]（[[神武天皇即位紀元]]）として制定
== 誕生日 == * [[永正]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1507年]][[12月18日]]） - [[大内義隆]]、大名（+ [[1551年]]） * [[寛政]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1798年]][[1月1日]]） - [[歌川国芳]]、[[浮世絵]]師（+ [[1861年]]） * [[文政]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1819年]][[12月31日]]） - [[宮地常磐]]、潮江天満宮神主（+ [[1890年]]） * [[天保]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[1月3日]]） - [[坂本龍馬]]、幕末の志士（+ [[1867年]]） * [[弘化]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1847年]][[12月22日]]） - [[大槻文彦]]、[[国語学]]者『言海』（+ [[1928年]]） * [[文久]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1861年]][[12月16日]]） - [[落合直文]]、[[歌人]]（+ [[1903年]]） * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[12月25日]]） - [[志賀重昂]]、[[地理学]]者・政治家（+ [[1927年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]14年（ユリウス暦[[1586年]][[12月25日]]） - [[吉川元春]]、[[武将|戦国武将]]・[[毛利元就]]の次男（* [[1530年]]） * [[承応]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654年]][[1月3日]]） - [[松永貞徳]]、[[俳諧師]]・古典学者（* [[1571年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月10日]]） - [[坂本龍馬]]、幕末の志士（* [[1836年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == ⒈七五三
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|14|11|16|10|15|12|11|1115}}
[[Category:kk]][[en:11月15日 (旧暦)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

{{Lunar November}} '''Lunar November15日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の15日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[慶長]]19年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1614年]][[12月15日]]） - [[大坂の陣#大坂冬の陣|大坂冬の陣]]で[[徳川家康]]軍が[[大坂城]]攻撃に出陣 * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月10日]]） - [[近江屋事件]]にて[[坂本龍馬]]と[[中岡慎太郎]]が襲撃される。龍馬は当日死亡、中岡は事件から3日目に死亡した。 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月15日]]） - 「[[国立銀行条例]]」制定 * 明治5年（グレゴリオ暦1872年12月15日） - [[神武天皇]]即位の年を日本の[[紀元]]（[[神武天皇即位紀元]]）として制定
== 誕生日 == * [[永正]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1507年]][[12月18日]]） - [[大内義隆]]、大名（+ [[1551年]]） * [[寛政]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1798年]][[1月1日]]） - [[歌川国芳]]、[[浮世絵]]師（+ [[1861年]]） * [[文政]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1819年]][[12月31日]]） - [[宮地常磐]]、潮江天満宮神主（+ [[1890年]]） * [[天保]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[1月3日]]） - [[坂本龍馬]]、幕末の志士（+ [[1867年]]） * [[弘化]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1847年]][[12月22日]]） - [[大槻文彦]]、[[国語学]]者『言海』（+ [[1928年]]） * [[文久]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1861年]][[12月16日]]） - [[落合直文]]、[[歌人]]（+ [[1903年]]） * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[12月25日]]） - [[志賀重昂]]、[[地理学]]者・政治家（+ [[1927年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]14年（ユリウス暦[[1586年]][[12月25日]]） - [[吉川元春]]、[[武将|戦国武将]]・[[毛利元就]]の次男（* [[1530年]]） * [[承応]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654年]][[1月3日]]） - [[松永貞徳]]、[[俳諧師]]・古典学者（* [[1571年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月10日]]） - [[坂本龍馬]]、幕末の志士（* [[1836年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == ⒈七五三
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|14|11|16|10|15|12|11|1115}}

--> == Events == * [[慶長]]19年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1614年]][[12月15日]]） - [[大坂の陣#大坂冬の陣|大坂冬の陣]]で[[徳川家康]]軍が[[大坂城]]攻撃に出陣 * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月10日]]） - [[近江屋事件]]にて[[坂本龍馬]]と[[中岡慎太郎]]が襲撃される。龍馬は当日死亡、中岡は事件から3日目に死亡した。 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月15日]]） - 「[[国立銀行条例]]」制定 * 明治5年（グレゴリオ暦1872年12月15日） - [[神武天皇]]即位の年を日本の[[紀元]]（[[神武天皇即位紀元]]）として制定
== Births == * [[永正]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1507年]][[12月18日]]） - [[大内義隆]]、大名（+ [[1551年]]） * [[寛政]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1798年]][[1月1日]]） - [[歌川国芳]]、[[浮世絵]]師（+ [[1861年]]） * [[文政]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1819年]][[12月31日]]） - [[宮地常磐]]、潮江天満宮神主（+ [[1890年]]） * [[天保]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[1月3日]]） - [[坂本龍馬]]、幕末の志士（+ [[1867年]]） * [[弘化]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1847年]][[12月22日]]） - [[大槻文彦]]、[[国語学]]者『言海』（+ [[1928年]]） * [[文久]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1861年]][[12月16日]]） - [[落合直文]]、[[歌人]]（+ [[1903年]]） * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[12月25日]]） - [[志賀重昂]]、[[地理学]]者・政治家（+ [[1927年]]）
== Deaths == * [[天正]]14年（ユリウス暦[[1586年]][[12月25日]]） - [[吉川元春]]、[[武将|戦国武将]]・[[毛利元就]]の次男（* [[1530年]]） * [[承応]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654年]][[1月3日]]） - [[松永貞徳]]、[[俳諧師]]・古典学者（* [[1571年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月10日]]） - [[坂本龍馬]]、幕末の志士（* [[1836年]]）
== Commemorations == ⒈七五三
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|14|11|16|10|15|12|11|1115}}

--> == Events == * [[慶長]]19年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1614年]][[12月15日]]） - [[大坂の陣#大坂冬の陣|大坂冬の陣]]で[[徳川家康]]軍が[[大坂城]]攻撃に出陣 * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月10日]]） - [[近江屋事件]]にて[[坂本龍馬]]と[[中岡慎太郎]]が襲撃される。龍馬は当日死亡、中岡は事件から3日目に死亡した。 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月15日]]） - 「[[国立銀行条例]]」制定 * 明治5年（グレゴリオ暦1872年12月15日） - [[神武天皇]]即位の年を日本の[[紀元]]（[[神武天皇即位紀元]]）として制定
== Births == * [[永正]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1507年]][[12月18日]]） - [[大内義隆]]、大名（+ [[1551年]]） * [[寛政]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1798年]][[1月1日]]） - [[歌川国芳]]、[[浮世絵]]師（+ [[1861年]]） * [[文政]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1819年]][[12月31日]]） - [[宮地常磐]]、潮江天満宮神主（+ [[1890年]]） * [[天保]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[1月3日]]） - [[坂本龍馬]]、幕末の志士（+ [[1867年]]） * [[弘化]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1847年]][[12月22日]]） - [[大槻文彦]]、[[国語学]]者『言海』（+ [[1928年]]） * [[文久]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1861年]][[12月16日]]） - [[落合直文]]、[[歌人]]（+ [[1903年]]） * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[12月25日]]） - [[志賀重昂]]、[[地理学]]者・政治家（+ [[1927年]]）
== Deaths == * [[天正]]14年（ユリウス暦[[1586年]][[12月25日]]） - [[吉川元春]]、[[武将|戦国武将]]・[[毛利元就]]の次男（* [[1530年]]） * [[承応]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654年]][[1月3日]]） - [[松永貞徳]]、[[俳諧師]]・古典学者（* [[1571年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月10日]]） - [[坂本龍馬]]、幕末の志士（* [[1836年]]）
== Commemorations == ⒈七五三
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|14|11|16|10|15|12|11|1115}}

[[sn:November 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 15일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十五]] [[zh:十一月十五]] [[en:draft:November 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * [[慶長]]19年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1614]][[12月15日]]） - [[大坂の陣#大坂冬の陣|大坂冬の陣]]で[[徳川家康]]軍が[[大坂城]]攻撃に出陣 * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867]][[12月10日]]） - [[近江屋事件]]にて[[坂本龍馬]]と[[中岡慎太郎]]が襲撃される。龍馬は当日死亡、中岡は事件から3日目に死亡した。 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872]][[12月15日]]） - 「[[国立銀行条例]]」制定 * 明治5年（グレゴリオ暦1872年12月15日） - [[神武天皇]]即位の年を日本の[[紀元]]（[[神武天皇即位紀元]]）として制定
== Births == * [[永正]]4年（[[Julian Calendar]][[1507]][[12月18日]]） - [[大内義隆]]、大名（+ [[1551]]） * [[寛政]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1798]][[1月1日]]） - [[歌川国芳]]、[[浮世絵]]師（+ [[1861]]） * [[文政]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1819]][[12月31日]]） - [[宮地常磐]]、潮江天満宮神主（+ [[1890]]） * [[天保]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836]][[1月3日]]） - [[坂本龍馬]]、幕末の志士（+ [[1867]]） * [[弘化]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1847]][[12月22日]]） - [[大槻文彦]]、[[国語学]]者『言海』（+ [[1928]]） * [[文久]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1861]][[12月16日]]） - [[落合直文]]、[[歌人]]（+ [[1903]]） * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863]][[12月25日]]） - [[志賀重昂]]、[[地理学]]者・政治家（+ [[1927]]）
== Deaths == * [[天正]]14年（ユリウス暦[[1586]][[12月25日]]） - [[吉川元春]]、[[武将|戦国武将]]・[[毛利元就]]の次男（* [[1530]]） * [[承応]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654]][[1月3日]]） - [[松永貞徳]]、[[俳諧師]]・古典学者（* [[1571]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867]][[12月10日]]） - [[坂本龍馬]]、幕末の志士（* [[1836]]）
== Commemorations == ⒈七五三

== Events == * [[Keichō]] 19th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1614]] [[12月15日]] ） - [[大坂の陣#大坂冬の陣|大坂冬の陣]] で[[徳川家康]] 軍が[[大坂城]] 攻撃に出陣 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[12月10日]] ） - [[近江屋事件]] にて[[坂本龍馬]] と[[中岡慎太郎]] が襲撃される。龍馬は当日死亡、中岡は事件から3日目に死亡した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[12月15日]] ） - 「[[国立銀行条例]] 」制定 * 明治5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1872年12月15日） - [[神武天皇]] 即位の年を日本の[[紀元]] （[[神武天皇即位紀元]] ）として制定

[[sn:November 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 15일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十五]] [[zh:十一月十五]] [[en:draft:November 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 19th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1614]] [[December 15]] ） - [[大坂の陣#大坂冬の陣|大坂冬の陣]] で[[徳川家康]] 軍が[[大坂城]] 攻撃に出陣 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[近江屋事件]] にて[[坂本龍馬]] と[[中岡慎太郎]] が襲撃される。龍馬は当日死亡、中岡は事件から3日目に死亡した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 15]] ） - 「[[国立銀行条例]] 」制定 * 明治5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1872年12月15日） - [[神武天皇]] 即位の年を日本の[[紀元]] （[[神武天皇即位紀元]] ）として制定
== Births == * [[永正]] 4th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1507]] [[December 18]] ） - [[大内義隆]] 、大名（+ [[1551]] ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 1]] ） - [[歌川国芳]] 、[[浮世絵]] 師（+ [[1861]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 31]] ） - [[宮地常磐]] 、潮江天満宮神主（+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[January 3]] ） - [[坂本龍馬]] 、幕末の志士（+ [[1867]] ） * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1847]] [[December 22]] ） - [[大槻文彦]] 、[[国語学]] 者『言海』（+ [[1928]] ） * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1861]] [[December 16]] ） - [[落合直文]] 、[[歌人]] （+ [[1903]] ） * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[December 25]] ） - [[志賀重昂]] 、[[地理学]] 者・政治家（+ [[1927]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 14th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1586]] [[December 25]] ） - [[吉川元春]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] ・[[毛利元就]] の次男（* [[1530]] ） * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 3]] ） - [[松永貞徳]] 、[[俳諧師]] ・古典学者（* [[1571]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[坂本龍馬]] 、幕末の志士（* [[1836]] ）
== Commemorations == ⒈七五三
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|14|11|16|10|15|12|11|1115}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 19th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1614]] [[December 15]] ） - [[大坂の陣#大坂冬の陣|大坂冬の陣]] で[[徳川家康]] 軍が[[大坂城]] 攻撃に出陣 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[近江屋事件]] にて[[坂本龍馬]] と[[中岡慎太郎]] が襲撃される。龍馬は当日死亡、中岡は事件から3日目に死亡した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 15]] ） - 「[[国立銀行条例]] 」制定 * 明治5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1872年12月15日） - [[神武天皇]] 即位の年を日本の[[紀元]] （[[神武天皇即位紀元]] ）として制定
== Births == * [[永正]] 4th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1507]] [[December 18]] ） - [[大内義隆]] 、大名（+ [[1551]] ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 1]] ） - [[歌川国芳]] 、[[浮世絵]] 師（+ [[1861]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 31]] ） - [[宮地常磐]] 、潮江天満宮神主（+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[January 3]] ） - [[坂本龍馬]] 、幕末の志士（+ [[1867]] ） * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1847]] [[December 22]] ） - [[大槻文彦]] 、[[国語学]] 者『言海』（+ [[1928]] ） * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1861]] [[December 16]] ） - [[落合直文]] 、[[歌人]] （+ [[1903]] ） * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[December 25]] ） - [[志賀重昂]] 、[[地理学]] 者・政治家（+ [[1927]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 14th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1586]] [[December 25]] ） - [[吉川元春]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] ・[[毛利元就]] の次男（* [[1530]] ） * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 3]] ） - [[松永貞徳]] 、[[俳諧師]] ・古典学者（* [[1571]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[坂本龍馬]] 、幕末の志士（* [[1836]] ）

[[sn:November 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 15일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十五]] [[zh:十一月十五]] [[en:draft:November 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 19th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1614]] [[December 15]] ） - [[大坂の陣#大坂冬の陣|大坂冬の陣]] で[[徳川家康]] 軍が[[大坂城]] 攻撃に出陣 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[近江屋事件]] にて[[坂本龍馬]] と[[中岡慎太郎]] が襲撃される。龍馬は当日死亡、中岡は事件から3日目に死亡した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 15]] ） - 「[[国立銀行条例]] 」制定 * 明治5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1872年12月15日） - [[神武天皇]] 即位の年を日本の[[紀元]] （[[神武天皇即位紀元]] ）として制定
== Births == * [[永正]] 4th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1507]] [[December 18]] ） - [[大内義隆]] 、大名（+ [[1551]] ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 1]] ） - [[歌川国芳]] 、[[浮世絵]] 師（+ [[1861]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 31]] ） - [[宮地常磐]] 、潮江天満宮神主（+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[January 3]] ） - [[坂本龍馬]] 、幕末の志士（+ [[1867]] ） * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1847]] [[December 22]] ） - [[大槻文彦]] 、[[国語学]] 者『言海』（+ [[1928]] ） * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1861]] [[December 16]] ） - [[落合直文]] 、[[歌人]] （+ [[1903]] ） * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[December 25]] ） - [[志賀重昂]] 、[[地理学]] 者・政治家（+ [[1927]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 14th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1586]] [[December 25]] ） - [[吉川元春]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] ・[[毛利元就]] の次男（* [[1530]] ） * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 3]] ） - [[松永貞徳]] 、[[俳諧師]] ・古典学者（* [[1571]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[坂本龍馬]] 、幕末の志士（* [[1836]] ）
== Commemorations == ⒈七五三

[[sn:November 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 15일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十五]] [[zh:十一月十五]] [[en:draft:November 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 19th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1614]] [[December 15]] ） - [[大坂の陣#大坂冬の陣|大坂冬の陣]] で[[徳川家康]] 軍が[[大坂城]] 攻撃に出陣 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[近江屋事件]] にて[[坂本龍馬]] と[[中岡慎太郎]] が襲撃される。龍馬は当日死亡、中岡は事件から3日目に死亡した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 15]] ） - 「[[国立銀行条例]] 」制定 * 明治5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1872年12月15日） - [[神武天皇]] 即位の年を日本の[[紀元]] （[[神武天皇即位紀元]] ）として制定
== Births == * [[永正]] 4th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1507]] [[December 18]] ） - [[大内義隆]] 、大名（+ [[1551]] ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 1]] ） - [[歌川国芳]] 、[[浮世絵]] 師（+ [[1861]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 31]] ） - [[宮地常磐]] 、潮江天満宮神主（+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[January 3]] ） - [[坂本龍馬]] 、幕末の志士（+ [[1867]] ） * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1847]] [[December 22]] ） - [[大槻文彦]] 、[[国語学]] 者『言海』（+ [[1928]] ） * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1861]] [[December 16]] ） - [[落合直文]] 、[[歌人]] （+ [[1903]] ） * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[December 25]] ） - [[志賀重昂]] 、[[地理学]] 者・政治家（+ [[1927]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 14th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1586]] [[December 25]] ） - [[吉川元春]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] ・[[毛利元就]] の次男（* [[1530]] ） * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 3]] ） - [[松永貞徳]] 、[[俳諧師]] ・古典学者（* [[1571]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[坂本龍馬]] 、幕末の志士（* [[1836]] ）
== Commemorations == ⒈七五三

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 19th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1614]] [[December 15]] ） - [[大坂の陣#大坂冬の陣|大坂冬の陣]] で[[徳川家康]] 軍が[[大坂城]] 攻撃に出陣 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[近江屋事件]] にて[[Sakamoto Ryōma]] と[[中岡慎太郎]] が襲撃される。龍馬は当日死亡、中岡は事件から3日目に死亡した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 15]] ） - 「[[国立銀行条例]] 」制定 * 明治5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1872nd year 12月15日） - [[神武天皇]] 即位の年を日本の[[紀元]] （[[神武天皇即位紀元]] ）として制定
== Births == * [[永正]] 4th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1507]] [[December 18]] ） - [[大内義隆]] 、大名（+ [[1551]] ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 1]] ） - [[歌川国芳]] 、[[Ukiyo-e]] 師（+ [[1861]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 31]] ） - [[宮地常磐]] 、潮江天満宮神主（+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[January 3]] ） - [[Sakamoto Ryōma]] 、幕末の志士（+ [[1867]] ） * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1847]] [[December 22]] ） - [[大槻文彦]] 、[[国語学]] 者『言海』（+ [[1928]] ） * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1861]] [[December 16]] ） - [[落合直文]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （+ [[1903]] ） * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[December 25]] ） - [[志賀重昂]] 、[[地理学]] 者・政治家（+ [[1927]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 14th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1586]] [[December 25]] ） - [[吉川元春]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] ・[[Mōri Motonari]] の次男（* [[1530]] ） * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 3]] ） - [[松永貞徳]] 、[[Haikai Poet]] ・古典学者（* [[1571]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[Sakamoto Ryōma]] 、幕末の志士（* [[1836]] ）

[[sn:November 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 15일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十五]] [[zh:十一月十五]] [[en:draft:November 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 19th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1614]] [[December 15]] ） - [[大坂の陣#大坂冬の陣|大坂冬の陣]] で[[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] 軍が[[大坂城]] 攻撃に出陣 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[近江屋事件]] にて[[Sakamoto Ryōma]] と[[中岡慎太郎]] が襲撃される。龍馬は当日死亡、中岡は事件から3日目に死亡した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 15]] ） - 「[[国立銀行条例]] 」制定 * 明治5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1872nd year 12月15日） - [[神武天皇]] 即位の年を日本の[[紀元]] （[[神武天皇即位紀元]] ）として制定
== Births == * [[永正]] 4th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1507]] [[December 18]] ） - [[大内義隆]] 、大名（+ [[1551]] ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 1]] ） - [[歌川国芳]] 、[[Ukiyo-e]] 師（+ [[1861]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 31]] ） - [[宮地常磐]] 、潮江天満宮神主（+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[January 3]] ） - [[Sakamoto Ryōma]] 、幕末の志士（+ [[1867]] ） * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1847]] [[December 22]] ） - [[大槻文彦]] 、[[国語学]] 者『言海』（+ [[1928]] ） * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1861]] [[December 16]] ） - [[落合直文]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （+ [[1903]] ） * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[December 25]] ） - [[志賀重昂]] 、[[地理学]] 者・政治家（+ [[1927]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 14th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1586]] [[December 25]] ） - [[吉川元春]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] ・[[Mōri Motonari]] の次男（* [[1530]] ） * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 3]] ） - [[松永貞徳]] 、[[Haikai Poet]] ・古典学者（* [[1571]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[Sakamoto Ryōma]] 、幕末の志士（* [[1836]] ）
== Commemorations == ⒈七五三

[[sn:November 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 15일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十五]] [[zh:十一月十五]] [[en:draft:November 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 19th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1614]] [[December 15]] ） - [[大坂の陣#大坂冬の陣|大坂冬の陣]] で[[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] 軍が[[大坂城]] 攻撃に出陣 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[近江屋事件]] にて[[Sakamoto Ryōma]] と[[中岡慎太郎]] が襲撃される。龍馬は当日死亡、中岡は事件から3日目に死亡した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 15]] ） - 「[[国立銀行条例]] 」制定 * 明治5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1872nd year 12月15日） - [[神武天皇]] 即位の年を日本の[[紀元]] （[[神武天皇即位紀元]] ）として制定
== Births == * [[永正]] 4th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1507]] [[December 18]] ） - [[大内義隆]] 、大名（+ [[1551]] ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 1]] ） - [[歌川国芳]] 、[[Ukiyo-e]] 師（+ [[1861]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 31]] ） - [[宮地常磐]] 、潮江天満宮神主（+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[January 3]] ） - [[Sakamoto Ryōma]] 、幕末の志士（+ [[1867]] ） * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1847]] [[December 22]] ） - [[大槻文彦]] 、[[国語学]] 者『言海』（+ [[1928]] ） * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1861]] [[December 16]] ） - [[落合直文]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （+ [[1903]] ） * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[December 25]] ） - [[志賀重昂]] 、[[地理学]] 者・政治家（+ [[1927]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 14th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1586]] [[December 25]] ） - [[吉川元春]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] ・[[Mōri Motonari]] の次男（* [[1530]] ） * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 3]] ） - [[松永貞徳]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] ・古典学者（* [[1571]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[Sakamoto Ryōma]] 、幕末の志士（* [[1836]] ）
== Commemorations == ⒈七五三

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 14th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1586]] [[December 25]] ） - [[吉川元春]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] ・[[Mōri Motonari]] の次男（* [[1530]] ） * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 3]] ） - [[松永貞徳]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] ・古典学者（* [[1571]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[Sakamoto Ryōma]] 、幕末の志士（* [[1836]] ）

[[sn:November 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 15일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十五]] [[zh:十一月十五]] [[en:draft:November 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 19th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1614]] [[December 15]] ） - [[大坂の陣#大坂冬の陣|大坂冬の陣]] で[[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] 軍が[[大坂城]] 攻撃に出陣 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[近江屋事件]] にて[[Sakamoto Ryōma]] と[[中岡慎太郎]] が襲撃される。龍馬は当日死亡、中岡は事件から3日目に死亡した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 15]] ） - 「[[国立銀行条例]] 」制定 * 明治5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1872nd year 12月15日） - [[神武天皇]] 即位の年を日本の[[紀元]] （[[神武天皇即位紀元]] ）として制定
== Births == * [[永正]] 4th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1507]] [[December 18]] ） - [[大内義隆]] 、大名（+ [[1551]] ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 1]] ） - [[歌川国芳]] 、[[Ukiyo-e]] 師（+ [[1861]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 31]] ） - [[宮地常磐]] 、潮江天満宮神主（+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[January 3]] ） - [[Sakamoto Ryōma]] 、幕末の志士（+ [[1867]] ） * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1847]] [[December 22]] ） - [[大槻文彦]] 、[[国語学]] 者『言海』（+ [[1928]] ） * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1861]] [[December 16]] ） - [[落合直文]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （+ [[1903]] ） * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[December 25]] ） - [[志賀重昂]] 、[[地理学]] 者・政治家（+ [[1927]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 14th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1586]] [[December 25]] ） - [[吉川元春]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] ・[[Mōri Motonari]] の次男（* [[1530]] ） * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 3]] ） - [[松永貞徳]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] ・古典学者（* [[1571]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[Sakamoto Ryōma]] 、幕末の志士（* [[1836]] ）
== Commemorations == ⒈七五三

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十五]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 19th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1614]] [[December 15]] ） - [[大坂の陣#大坂冬の陣|大坂冬の陣]] で[[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] 軍が[[大坂城]] 攻撃に出陣 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[近江屋事件]] にて[[Sakamoto Ryōma]] と[[中岡慎太郎]] が襲撃される。龍馬は当日死亡、中岡は事件から3日目に死亡した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 15]] ） - 「[[国立銀行条例]] 」制定 * 明治5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1872nd year 12月15日） - [[神武天皇]] 即位の年を日本の[[紀元]] （[[神武天皇即位紀元]] ）として制定
== Births == * [[永正]] 4th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1507]] [[December 18]] ） - [[大内義隆]] 、大名（+ [[1551]] ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1798]] [[January 1]] ） - [[歌川国芳]] 、[[Ukiyo-e]] 師（+ [[1861]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 31]] ） - [[宮地常磐]] 、潮江天満宮神主（+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[January 3]] ） - [[Sakamoto Ryōma]] 、幕末の志士（+ [[1867]] ） * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1847]] [[December 22]] ） - [[大槻文彦]] 、[[国語学]] 者『言海』（+ [[1928]] ） * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1861]] [[December 16]] ） - [[落合直文]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （+ [[1903]] ） * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[December 25]] ） - [[志賀重昂]] 、[[地理学]] 者・政治家（+ [[1927]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 14th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1586]] [[December 25]] ） - [[吉川元春]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] ・[[Mōri Motonari]] の次男（* [[1530]] ） * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 3]] ） - [[松永貞徳]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] ・古典学者（* [[1571]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[Sakamoto Ryōma]] 、幕末の志士（* [[1836]] ）
== Commemorations == ⒈七五三
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|14|11|16|10|15|12|11|1115}}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十五]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十五]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 14th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1586]] [[December 25]] ） - [[吉川元春]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] ・[[Mōri Motonari]] の次男（* [[1530]] ） * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応|12=draft}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 3]] ） - [[松永貞徳]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] ・古典学者（* [[1571]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 10]] ） - [[Sakamoto Ryōma]] 、幕末の志士（* [[1836]] ）

== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1614]] {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}}) – During the {{ill|Osaka Winter Campaign|ja|大坂冬の陣}}, the army of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} set out to attack {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城}}. * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1867]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}}) – In the [[Ōmiya Incident]], both {{ill|Sakamoto Ryōma|ja|坂本龍馬}} and {{ill|Nakaoka Shintarō|ja|中岡慎太郎}} were attacked; Ryōma died on that day, and Shintarō died three days later. * {{ill|Meiji era|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1872]] {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}}) – The {{ill|National Bank Ordinance|ja|国立銀行条例}} was enacted. * In Meiji 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1872, 12月15日) – The year of the accession of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}} was established as the Japanese era of [[Kigen]] ({{ill|Jimmu Tennō Sokui Kigen|ja|神武天皇即位紀元}}).
== Births == * {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1507]] {{ill|December 18|ja|12月18日}}) – {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|ja|大内義隆}}, a daimyō (died [[1551]]). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1798]] {{ill|January 1|ja|1月1日}}) – {{ill|Utagawa Kuniyoshi|ja|歌川国芳}}, an ukiyo-e artist (died [[1861]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1819]] {{ill|December 31|ja|12月31日}}) – {{ill|Miyaji Tsunetoki|ja|宮地常磐}}, head of the Chōkō-tenma Shrine (died [[1890]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1836]] {{ill|January 3|ja|1月3日}}) – {{ill|Sakamoto Ryōma|ja|坂本龍馬}}, a statesman of the Bakumatsu period (died [[1867]]). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1847]] {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}}) – {{ill|Ōtsuki Fumihiko|ja|大槻文彦}}, a linguist and author of "Gengai" (died [[1928]]). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1861]] {{ill|December 16|ja|12月16日}}) – {{ill|Ochiai Naofumi|ja|落合直文}}, a waka poet (died [[1903]]). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1863]] {{ill|December 25|ja|12月25日}}) – {{ill|Shiga Jūkō|ja|志賀重昂}}, a geographer and politician (died [[1927]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1586]] {{ill|December 25|ja|12月25日}}) – {{ill|Yoshikawa Motoharu|ja|吉川元春}}, a Sengoku-period warrior and the second son of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|毛利元就}} (born [[1530]]). * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1654]] {{ill|January 3|ja|1月3日}}) – {{ill|Matsunaga Sadatoku|ja|松永貞徳}}, a haiku poet and classicist (born [[1571]]). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1867]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}}) – {{ill|Sakamoto Ryōma|ja|坂本龍馬}}, a Bakumatsu statesman (born [[1836]]).
== Commemorations == ⒈ 七五三

revision.text:
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十五]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1614]] {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}}) – During the {{ill|Osaka Winter Campaign|ja|大坂冬の陣}}, the army of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} set out to attack {{ill|Osaka Castle|ja|大坂城}}. * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1867]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}}) – In the [[Ōmiya Incident]], both {{ill|Sakamoto Ryōma|ja|坂本龍馬}} and {{ill|Nakaoka Shintarō|ja|中岡慎太郎}} were attacked; Ryōma died on that day, and Shintarō died three days later. * {{ill|Meiji era|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1872]] {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}}) – The {{ill|National Bank Ordinance|ja|国立銀行条例}} was enacted. * In Meiji 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1872, 12月15日) – The year of the accession of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}} was established as the Japanese era of [[Kigen]] ({{ill|Jimmu Tennō Sokui Kigen|ja|神武天皇即位紀元}}).
== Births == * {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1507]] {{ill|December 18|ja|12月18日}}) – {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|ja|大内義隆}}, a daimyō (died [[1551]]). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1798]] {{ill|January 1|ja|1月1日}}) – {{ill|Utagawa Kuniyoshi|ja|歌川国芳}}, an ukiyo-e artist (died [[1861]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1819]] {{ill|December 31|ja|12月31日}}) – {{ill|Miyaji Tsunetoki|ja|宮地常磐}}, head of the Chōkō-tenma Shrine (died [[1890]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1836]] {{ill|January 3|ja|1月3日}}) – {{ill|Sakamoto Ryōma|ja|坂本龍馬}}, a statesman of the Bakumatsu period (died [[1867]]). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1847]] {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}}) – {{ill|Ōtsuki Fumihiko|ja|大槻文彦}}, a linguist and author of "Gengai" (died [[1928]]). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1861]] {{ill|December 16|ja|12月16日}}) – {{ill|Ochiai Naofumi|ja|落合直文}}, a waka poet (died [[1903]]). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1863]] {{ill|December 25|ja|12月25日}}) – {{ill|Shiga Jūkō|ja|志賀重昂}}, a geographer and politician (died [[1927]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1586]] {{ill|December 25|ja|12月25日}}) – {{ill|Yoshikawa Motoharu|ja|吉川元春}}, a Sengoku-period warrior and the second son of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|毛利元就}} (born [[1530]]). * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1654]] {{ill|January 3|ja|1月3日}}) – {{ill|Matsunaga Sadatoku|ja|松永貞徳}}, a haiku poet and classicist (born [[1571]]). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1867]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}}) – {{ill|Sakamoto Ryōma|ja|坂本龍馬}}, a Bakumatsu statesman (born [[1836]]).
== Commemorations == ⒈ 七五三
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|14|11|16|10|15|12|11|1115}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1586]] {{ill|December 25|ja|12月25日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Yoshikawa Motoharu|ja|吉川元春|12=draft}}, a Sengoku-period warrior and the second son of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|毛利元就|12=draft}} (born [[1530]]). * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1654]] {{ill|January 3|ja|1月3日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Matsunaga Sadatoku|ja|松永貞徳|12=draft}}, a haiku poet and classicist (born [[1571]]). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1867]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Sakamoto Ryōma|ja|坂本龍馬|12=draft}}, a Bakumatsu statesman (born [[1836]]).
== Commemorations == ⒈ 七五三
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|14|11|16|10|15|12|11|1115}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|November 15|qq=November 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – During the {{ill|Osaka Winter Campaign|ja|大坂冬の陣|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Winter Campaign|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣}}, the army of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] set out to attack [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]]. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – In the [[Ōmiya Incident]], both [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]] and [[:en:Nakaoka Shintarō|Nakaoka Shintarō]] were attacked; Ryōma died on that day, and Shintarō died three days later. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – The {{ill|National Bank Ordinance|ja|国立銀行条例|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Bank Ordinance|qq=}} was enacted. * In Meiji 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1872, 12月15日) – The year of the accession of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] was established as the Japanese era of [[:en:Kigen|Kigen]] ([[:en:Japanese imperial year|Japanese imperial year]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1507|1507]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – [[:en:Ōuchi Yoshitaka|Ōuchi Yoshitaka]], a daimyō (died [[:en:1551|1551]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], an ukiyo-e artist (died [[:en:1861|1861]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] [[:en:December 31|December 31]]) – {{ill|Miyaji Tsunetoki|ja|宮地常磐|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyaji Tsunetoki|qq=}}, head of the Chōkō-tenma Shrine (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a statesman of the Bakumatsu period (died [[:en:1867|1867]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Ōtsuki Fumihiko|Ōtsuki Fumihiko]], a linguist and author of "Gengai" (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – [[:en:Ochiai Naobumi|Ochiai Naofumi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Shiga Shigetaka|Shiga Jūkō]], a geographer and politician (died [[:en:1927|1927]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Motoharu|Yoshikawa Motoharu]], a Sengoku-period warrior and the second son of [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]] (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Matsunaga Teitoku|Matsunaga Sadatoku]], a haiku poet and classicist (born [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a Bakumatsu statesman (born [[:en:1836|1836]]).
== Commemorations == ⒈ 七五三
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|14|11|16|10|15|12|11|1115|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840417]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 15|qq=November 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}}.

== Births == * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1507|1507]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – [[:en:Ōuchi Yoshitaka|Ōuchi Yoshitaka]], a daimyō (died [[:en:1551|1551]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], an ukiyo-e artist (died [[:en:1861|1861]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] [[:en:December 31|December 31]]) – {{ill|Miyaji Tsunetoki|ja|宮地常磐|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyaji Tsunetoki|qq=}}, head of the Chōkō-tenma Shrine (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a statesman of the Bakumatsu period (died [[:en:1867|1867]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Ōtsuki Fumihiko|Ōtsuki Fumihiko]], a linguist and author of "Gengai" (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – [[:en:Ochiai Naobumi|Ochiai Naofumi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Shiga Shigetaka|Shiga Jūkō]], a geographer and politician (died [[:en:1927|1927]]).

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840417]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 15|qq=November 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – During the {{ill|Osaka Winter Campaign|ja|大坂冬の陣|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Winter Campaign|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣|1=Siege of Osaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q475780}}, the army of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] set out to attack [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]]. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – In the [[Ōmiya Incident]], both [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]] and [[:en:Nakaoka Shintarō|Nakaoka Shintarō]] were attacked; Ryōma died on that day, and Shintarō died three days later. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – The {{ill|National Bank Ordinance|ja|国立銀行条例|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Bank Ordinance|qq=|1=National Bank Ordinance|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116982847}} was enacted. * In Meiji 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1872, 12月15日) – The year of the accession of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] was established as the Japanese era of [[:en:Kigen|Kigen]] ([[:en:Japanese imperial year|Japanese imperial year]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1507|1507]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – [[:en:Ōuchi Yoshitaka|Ōuchi Yoshitaka]], a daimyō (died [[:en:1551|1551]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], an ukiyo-e artist (died [[:en:1861|1861]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] [[:en:December 31|December 31]]) – {{ill|Miyaji Tsunetoki|ja|宮地常磐|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyaji Tsunetoki|qq=|1=Miyaji Tsunetoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11453528}}, head of the Chōkō-tenma Shrine (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a statesman of the Bakumatsu period (died [[:en:1867|1867]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Ōtsuki Fumihiko|Ōtsuki Fumihiko]], a linguist and author of "Gengai" (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – [[:en:Ochiai Naobumi|Ochiai Naofumi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Shiga Shigetaka|Shiga Jūkō]], a geographer and politician (died [[:en:1927|1927]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Motoharu|Yoshikawa Motoharu]], a Sengoku-period warrior and the second son of [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]] (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Matsunaga Teitoku|Matsunaga Sadatoku]], a haiku poet and classicist (born [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a Bakumatsu statesman (born [[:en:1836|1836]]).
== Commemorations == ⒈ 七五三

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840417]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 15|qq=November 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – During the {{ill|Osaka Winter Campaign|ja|大坂冬の陣|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Winter Campaign|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣|1=Siege of Osaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q475780}}, the army of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] set out to attack [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]]. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – In the [[Ōmiya Incident]], both [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]] and [[:en:Nakaoka Shintarō|Nakaoka Shintarō]] were attacked; Ryōma died on that day, and Shintarō died three days later. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – The {{ill|National Bank Ordinance|ja|国立銀行条例|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Bank Ordinance|qq=|1=National Bank Ordinance|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116982847}} was enacted. * In Meiji 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1872, 12月15日) – The year of the accession of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] was established as the Japanese era of [[:en:Kigen|Kigen]] ([[:en:Japanese imperial year|Japanese imperial year]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1507|1507]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – [[:en:Ōuchi Yoshitaka|Ōuchi Yoshitaka]], a daimyō (died [[:en:1551|1551]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], an ukiyo-e artist (died [[:en:1861|1861]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] [[:en:December 31|December 31]]) – {{ill|Miyaji Tsunetoki|ja|宮地常磐|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyaji Tsunetoki|qq=|1=Miyaji Tsunetoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11453528}}, head of the Chōkō-tenma Shrine (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a statesman of the Bakumatsu period (died [[:en:1867|1867]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Ōtsuki Fumihiko|Ōtsuki Fumihiko]], a linguist and author of "Gengai" (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – [[:en:Ochiai Naobumi|Ochiai Naofumi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Shiga Shigetaka|Shiga Jūkō]], a geographer and politician (died [[:en:1927|1927]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Motoharu|Yoshikawa Motoharu]], a Sengoku-period warrior and the second son of [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]] (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Matsunaga Teitoku|Matsunaga Sadatoku]], a haiku poet and classicist (born [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a Bakumatsu statesman (born [[:en:1836|1836]]).
== Commemorations == ⒈ 七五三
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|14|11|16|10|15|12|11|1115|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 15일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月十五]][[zh:十一月十五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840417]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 15|qq=November 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – During the {{ill|Osaka Winter Campaign|ja|大坂冬の陣|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Winter Campaign|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣|1=Siege of Osaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q475780}}, the army of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] set out to attack [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]]. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – In the [[Ōmiya Incident]], both [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]] and [[:en:Nakaoka Shintarō|Nakaoka Shintarō]] were attacked; Ryōma died on that day, and Shintarō died three days later. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – The {{ill|National Bank Ordinance|ja|国立銀行条例|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Bank Ordinance|qq=|1=National Bank Ordinance|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116982847}} was enacted. * In Meiji 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1872, 12月15日) – The year of the accession of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] was established as the Japanese era of [[:en:Kigen|Kigen]] ([[:en:Japanese imperial year|Japanese imperial year]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1507|1507]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – [[:en:Ōuchi Yoshitaka|Ōuchi Yoshitaka]], a daimyō (died [[:en:1551|1551]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], an ukiyo-e artist (died [[:en:1861|1861]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] [[:en:December 31|December 31]]) – {{ill|Miyaji Tsunetoki|ja|宮地常磐|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyaji Tsunetoki|qq=|1=Miyaji Tsunetoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11453528}}, head of the Chōkō-tenma Shrine (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a statesman of the Bakumatsu period (died [[:en:1867|1867]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Ōtsuki Fumihiko|Ōtsuki Fumihiko]], a linguist and author of "Gengai" (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – [[:en:Ochiai Naobumi|Ochiai Naofumi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Shiga Shigetaka|Shiga Jūkō]], a geographer and politician (died [[:en:1927|1927]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Motoharu|Yoshikawa Motoharu]], a Sengoku-period warrior and the second son of [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]] (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Matsunaga Teitoku|Matsunaga Sadatoku]], a haiku poet and classicist (born [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a Bakumatsu statesman (born [[:en:1836|1836]]).
== Commemorations == ⒈ 七五三

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十五]][[zh:十一月十五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840417]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 15|qq=November 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – During the {{ill|Osaka Winter Campaign|ja|大坂冬の陣|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Winter Campaign|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣|1=Siege of Osaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q475780}}, the army of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] set out to attack [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]]. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – In the [[Ōmiya Incident]], both [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]] and [[:en:Nakaoka Shintarō|Nakaoka Shintarō]] were attacked; Ryōma died on that day, and Shintarō died three days later. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – The {{ill|National Bank Ordinance|ja|国立銀行条例|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Bank Ordinance|qq=|1=National Bank Ordinance|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116982847}} was enacted. * In Meiji 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1872, 12月15日) – The year of the accession of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] was established as the Japanese era of [[:en:Kigen|Kigen]] ([[:en:Japanese imperial year|Japanese imperial year]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1507|1507]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – [[:en:Ōuchi Yoshitaka|Ōuchi Yoshitaka]], a daimyō (died [[:en:1551|1551]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], an ukiyo-e artist (died [[:en:1861|1861]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] [[:en:December 31|December 31]]) – {{ill|Miyaji Tsunetoki|ja|宮地常磐|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyaji Tsunetoki|qq=|1=Miyaji Tsunetoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11453528}}, head of the Chōkō-tenma Shrine (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a statesman of the Bakumatsu period (died [[:en:1867|1867]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Ōtsuki Fumihiko|Ōtsuki Fumihiko]], a linguist and author of "Gengai" (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – [[:en:Ochiai Naobumi|Ochiai Naofumi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Shiga Shigetaka|Shiga Jūkō]], a geographer and politician (died [[:en:1927|1927]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Motoharu|Yoshikawa Motoharu]], a Sengoku-period warrior and the second son of [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]] (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Matsunaga Teitoku|Matsunaga Sadatoku]], a haiku poet and classicist (born [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a Bakumatsu statesman (born [[:en:1836|1836]]).
== Commemorations == ⒈ 七五三

== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Motoharu|Yoshikawa Motoharu]], a Sengoku-period warrior and the second son of [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]] (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Matsunaga Teitoku|Matsunaga Sadatoku]], a haiku poet and classicist (born [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a Bakumatsu statesman (born [[:en:1836|1836]]).
== Commemorations == ⒈ 七五三

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – During the {{ill|Osaka Winter Campaign|ja|大坂冬の陣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Winter Campaign|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣|1=Siege of Osaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q475780}}, the army of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] set out to attack [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]]. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – In the [[Ōmiya Incident]], both [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]] and [[:en:Nakaoka Shintarō|Nakaoka Shintarō]] were attacked; Ryōma died on that day, and Shintarō died three days later. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – The {{ill|National Bank Ordinance|ja|国立銀行条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Bank Ordinance|1=National Bank Ordinance|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116982847}} was enacted. * In Meiji 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1872, 12月15日) – The year of the accession of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] was established as the Japanese era of [[:en:Kigen|Kigen]] ([[:en:Japanese imperial year|Japanese imperial year]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1507|1507]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – [[:en:Ōuchi Yoshitaka|Ōuchi Yoshitaka]], a daimyō (died [[:en:1551|1551]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], an ukiyo-e artist (died [[:en:1861|1861]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] [[:en:December 31|December 31]]) – {{ill|Miyaji Tsunetoki|ja|宮地常磐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyaji Tsunetoki|1=Miyaji Tsunetoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11453528}}, head of the Chōkō-tenma Shrine (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a statesman of the Bakumatsu period (died [[:en:1867|1867]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Ōtsuki Fumihiko|Ōtsuki Fumihiko]], a linguist and author of "Gengai" (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – [[:en:Ochiai Naobumi|Ochiai Naofumi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Shiga Shigetaka|Shiga Jūkō]], a geographer and politician (died [[:en:1927|1927]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Motoharu|Yoshikawa Motoharu]], a Sengoku-period warrior and the second son of [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]] (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Matsunaga Teitoku|Matsunaga Sadatoku]], a haiku poet and classicist (born [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a Bakumatsu statesman (born [[:en:1836|1836]]).
== Commemorations == ⒈ 七五三
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|14|11|16|10|15|12|11|1115|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十五]][[zh:十一月十五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840417]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 15|qq=November 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – During the {{ill|Osaka Winter Campaign|ja|大坂冬の陣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Winter Campaign|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣|1=Siege of Osaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q475780}}, the army of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] set out to attack [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]]. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – In the [[Ōmiya Incident]], both [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]] and [[:en:Nakaoka Shintarō|Nakaoka Shintarō]] were attacked; Ryōma died on that day, and Shintarō died three days later. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – The {{ill|National Bank Ordinance|ja|国立銀行条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Bank Ordinance|1=National Bank Ordinance|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116982847}} was enacted. * In Meiji 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1872, 12月15日) – The year of the accession of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] was established as the Japanese era of [[:en:Kigen|Kigen]] ([[:en:Japanese imperial year|Japanese imperial year]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1507|1507]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – [[:en:Ōuchi Yoshitaka|Ōuchi Yoshitaka]], a daimyō (died [[:en:1551|1551]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], an ukiyo-e artist (died [[:en:1861|1861]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] [[:en:December 31|December 31]]) – {{ill|Miyaji Tsunetoki|ja|宮地常磐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyaji Tsunetoki|1=Miyaji Tsunetoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11453528}}, head of the Chōkō-tenma Shrine (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a statesman of the Bakumatsu period (died [[:en:1867|1867]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Ōtsuki Fumihiko|Ōtsuki Fumihiko]], a linguist and author of "Gengai" (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – [[:en:Ochiai Naobumi|Ochiai Naofumi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Shiga Shigetaka|Shiga Jūkō]], a geographer and politician (died [[:en:1927|1927]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Motoharu|Yoshikawa Motoharu]], a Sengoku-period warrior and the second son of [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]] (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Matsunaga Teitoku|Matsunaga Sadatoku]], a haiku poet and classicist (born [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a Bakumatsu statesman (born [[:en:1836|1836]]).
== Commemorations == ⒈ 七五三
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|14|11|16|10|15|12|11|1115|qq=}}
