Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – During the {{ill|Osaka Winter Campaign|ja|大坂冬の陣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Winter Campaign|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣|1=Siege of Osaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q475780}}, the army of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] set out to attack [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]]. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – In the [[Ōmiya Incident]], both [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]] and [[:en:Nakaoka Shintarō|Nakaoka Shintarō]] were attacked; Ryōma died on that day, and Shintarō died three days later. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – The {{ill|National Bank Ordinance|ja|国立銀行条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Bank Ordinance|1=National Bank Ordinance|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116982847}} was enacted. * In Meiji 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1872, 12月15日) – The year of the accession of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] was established as the Japanese era of [[:en:Kigen|Kigen]] ([[:en:Japanese imperial year|Japanese imperial year]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1507|1507]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – [[:en:Ōuchi Yoshitaka|Ōuchi Yoshitaka]], a daimyō (died [[:en:1551|1551]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], an ukiyo-e artist (died [[:en:1861|1861]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] [[:en:December 31|December 31]]) – {{ill|Miyaji Tsunetoki|ja|宮地常磐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyaji Tsunetoki|1=Miyaji Tsunetoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11453528}}, head of the Chōkō-tenma Shrine (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a statesman of the Bakumatsu period (died [[:en:1867|1867]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Ōtsuki Fumihiko|Ōtsuki Fumihiko]], a linguist and author of "Gengai" (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – [[:en:Ochiai Naobumi|Ochiai Naofumi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Shiga Shigetaka|Shiga Jūkō]], a geographer and politician (died [[:en:1927|1927]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Motoharu|Yoshikawa Motoharu]], a Sengoku-period warrior and the second son of [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]] (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Matsunaga Teitoku|Matsunaga Sadatoku]], a haiku poet and classicist (born [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a Bakumatsu statesman (born [[:en:1836|1836]]).

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十五]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十五]] {{wikidata link|Q840417}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十五]][[zh:十一月十五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840417]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 15|qq=November 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – During the {{ill|Osaka Winter Campaign|ja|大坂冬の陣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Winter Campaign|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣|1=Siege of Osaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q475780}}, the army of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] set out to attack [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]]. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – In the [[Ōmiya Incident]], both [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]] and [[:en:Nakaoka Shintarō|Nakaoka Shintarō]] were attacked; Ryōma died on that day, and Shintarō died three days later. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – The {{ill|National Bank Ordinance|ja|国立銀行条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Bank Ordinance|1=National Bank Ordinance|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116982847}} was enacted. * In Meiji 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1872, 12月15日) – The year of the accession of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] was established as the Japanese era of [[:en:Kigen|Kigen]] ([[:en:Japanese imperial year|Japanese imperial year]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1507|1507]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – [[:en:Ōuchi Yoshitaka|Ōuchi Yoshitaka]], a daimyō (died [[:en:1551|1551]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], an ukiyo-e artist (died [[:en:1861|1861]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] [[:en:December 31|December 31]]) – {{ill|Miyaji Tsunetoki|ja|宮地常磐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyaji Tsunetoki|1=Miyaji Tsunetoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11453528}}, head of the Chōkō-tenma Shrine (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a statesman of the Bakumatsu period (died [[:en:1867|1867]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Ōtsuki Fumihiko|Ōtsuki Fumihiko]], a linguist and author of "Gengai" (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – [[:en:Ochiai Naobumi|Ochiai Naofumi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Shiga Shigetaka|Shiga Jūkō]], a geographer and politician (died [[:en:1927|1927]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Motoharu|Yoshikawa Motoharu]], a Sengoku-period warrior and the second son of [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]] (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Matsunaga Teitoku|Matsunaga Sadatoku]], a haiku poet and classicist (born [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a Bakumatsu statesman (born [[:en:1836|1836]]).
== Commemorations == ⒈ 七五三

== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – During the {{ill|Osaka Winter Campaign|ja|大坂冬の陣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Winter Campaign|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣|1=Siege of Osaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q475780}}, the army of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] set out to attack [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]]. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – In the [[Ōmiya Incident]], both [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]] and [[:en:Nakaoka Shintarō|Nakaoka Shintarō]] were attacked; Ryōma died on that day, and Shintarō died three days later. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – The {{ill|National Bank Ordinance|ja|国立銀行条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Bank Ordinance|1=National Bank Ordinance|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116982847}} was enacted. * In Meiji 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1872, 12月15日) – The year of the accession of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] was established as the Japanese era of [[:en:Kigen|Kigen]] ([[:en:Japanese imperial year|Japanese imperial year]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 15일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月十五]][[zh:十一月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十五]][[zh:十一月十五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840417]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 15|qq=November 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – During the {{ill|Osaka Winter Campaign|ja|大坂冬の陣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Winter Campaign|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣|1=Siege of Osaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q475780}}, the army of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] set out to attack [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]]. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – In the [[Ōmiya Incident]], both [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]] and [[:en:Nakaoka Shintarō|Nakaoka Shintarō]] were attacked; Ryōma died on that day, and Shintarō died three days later. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – The {{ill|National Bank Ordinance|ja|国立銀行条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Bank Ordinance|1=National Bank Ordinance|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116982847}} was enacted. * In Meiji 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1872, 12月15日) – The year of the accession of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] was established as the Japanese era of [[:en:Kigen|Kigen]] ([[:en:Japanese imperial year|Japanese imperial year]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1507|1507]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – [[:en:Ōuchi Yoshitaka|Ōuchi Yoshitaka]], a daimyō (died [[:en:1551|1551]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], an ukiyo-e artist (died [[:en:1861|1861]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] [[:en:December 31|December 31]]) – {{ill|Miyaji Tsunetoki|ja|宮地常磐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyaji Tsunetoki|1=Miyaji Tsunetoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11453528}}, head of the Chōkō-tenma Shrine (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a statesman of the Bakumatsu period (died [[:en:1867|1867]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Ōtsuki Fumihiko|Ōtsuki Fumihiko]], a linguist and author of "Gengai" (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – [[:en:Ochiai Naobumi|Ochiai Naofumi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Shiga Shigetaka|Shiga Jūkō]], a geographer and politician (died [[:en:1927|1927]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Motoharu|Yoshikawa Motoharu]], a Sengoku-period warrior and the second son of [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]] (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Matsunaga Teitoku|Matsunaga Sadatoku]], a haiku poet and classicist (born [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a Bakumatsu statesman (born [[:en:1836|1836]]).
== Commemorations == ⒈ 七五三

== Births == * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1507|1507]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – [[:en:Ōuchi Yoshitaka|Ōuchi Yoshitaka]], a daimyō (died [[:en:1551|1551]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], an ukiyo-e artist (died [[:en:1861|1861]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] [[:en:December 31|December 31]]) – {{ill|Miyaji Tsunetoki|ja|宮地常磐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyaji Tsunetoki|1=Miyaji Tsunetoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11453528}}, head of the Chōkō-tenma Shrine (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a statesman of the Bakumatsu period (died [[:en:1867|1867]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Ōtsuki Fumihiko|Ōtsuki Fumihiko]], a linguist and author of "Gengai" (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – [[:en:Ochiai Naobumi|Ochiai Naofumi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Shiga Shigetaka|Shiga Jūkō]], a geographer and politician (died [[:en:1927|1927]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Motoharu|Yoshikawa Motoharu]], a Sengoku-period warrior and the second son of [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]] (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Matsunaga Teitoku|Matsunaga Sadatoku]], a haiku poet and classicist (born [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a Bakumatsu statesman (born [[:en:1836|1836]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 15일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月十五]][[zh:十一月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 15일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月十五]][[zh:十一月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十五]][[zh:十一月十五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840417]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 15|qq=November 15}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – During the {{ill|Osaka Winter Campaign|ja|大坂冬の陣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Winter Campaign|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣|1=Siege of Osaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q475780}}, the army of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] set out to attack [[:en:Osaka Castle|Osaka Castle]]. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – In the [[Ōmiya Incident]], both [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]] and [[:en:Nakaoka Shintarō|Nakaoka Shintarō]] were attacked; Ryōma died on that day, and Shintarō died three days later. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]) – The {{ill|National Bank Ordinance|ja|国立銀行条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Bank Ordinance|1=National Bank Ordinance|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116982847}} was enacted. * In Meiji 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1872, 12月15日) – The year of the accession of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] was established as the Japanese era of [[:en:Kigen|Kigen]] ([[:en:Japanese imperial year|Japanese imperial year]]).
== Births == * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1507|1507]] [[:en:December 18|December 18]]) – [[:en:Ōuchi Yoshitaka|Ōuchi Yoshitaka]], a daimyō (died [[:en:1551|1551]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1798|1798]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – [[:en:Utagawa Kuniyoshi|Utagawa Kuniyoshi]], an ukiyo-e artist (died [[:en:1861|1861]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] [[:en:December 31|December 31]]) – {{ill|Miyaji Tsunetoki|ja|宮地常磐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyaji Tsunetoki|1=Miyaji Tsunetoki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11453528}}, head of the Chōkō-tenma Shrine (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a statesman of the Bakumatsu period (died [[:en:1867|1867]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – [[:en:Ōtsuki Fumihiko|Ōtsuki Fumihiko]], a linguist and author of "Gengai" (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1861|1861]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – [[:en:Ochiai Naobumi|Ochiai Naofumi]], a waka poet (died [[:en:1903|1903]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Shiga Shigetaka|Shiga Jūkō]], a geographer and politician (died [[:en:1927|1927]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Motoharu|Yoshikawa Motoharu]], a Sengoku-period warrior and the second son of [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]] (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Matsunaga Teitoku|Matsunaga Sadatoku]], a haiku poet and classicist (born [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a Bakumatsu statesman (born [[:en:1836|1836]]).
== Commemorations == ⒈ 七五三

== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:December 25|December 25]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Motoharu|Yoshikawa Motoharu]], a Sengoku-period warrior and the second son of [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]] (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Jōō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – [[:en:Matsunaga Teitoku|Matsunaga Sadatoku]], a haiku poet and classicist (born [[:en:1571|1571]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – [[:en:Sakamoto Ryōma|Sakamoto Ryōma]], a Bakumatsu statesman (born [[:en:1836|1836]]).
== Commemorations == ⒈ 七五三

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十五]][[zh:十一月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十五]][[zh:十一月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十五]][[zh:十一月十五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840417]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 15|qq=November 15}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1614|en|1614|WD=Q6781|lt=1614}} {{ill|December 15|en|December 15|WD=Q2383|lt=December 15}}) – During the {{ill|Osaka Winter Campaign|ja|大坂冬の陣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Winter Campaign|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣|1=Siege of Osaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q475780}}, the army of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} set out to attack {{ill|Osaka Castle|en|Osaka Castle|WD=Q321242|lt=Osaka Castle}}. * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867}} {{ill|December 10|en|December 10|WD=Q2302|lt=December 10}}) – In the [[Ōmiya Incident]], both {{ill|Sakamoto Ryōma|en|Sakamoto Ryōma|WD=Q378450|lt=Sakamoto Ryōma}} and {{ill|Nakaoka Shintarō|en|Nakaoka Shintarō|WD=Q3138626|lt=Nakaoka Shintarō}} were attacked; Ryōma died on that day, and Shintarō died three days later. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|December 15|en|December 15|WD=Q2383|lt=December 15}}) – The {{ill|National Bank Ordinance|ja|国立銀行条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Bank Ordinance|1=National Bank Ordinance|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116982847}} was enacted. * In Meiji 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1872, 12月15日) – The year of the accession of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|WD=Q200188|lt=Emperor Jimmu}} was established as the Japanese era of {{ill|Kigen|en|Kigen|WD=Q21509043|lt=Kigen}} ({{ill|Japanese imperial year|en|Japanese imperial year|WD=Q1209728|lt=Japanese imperial year}}).
== Births == * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1507|en|1507|WD=Q6161|lt=1507}} {{ill|December 18|en|December 18|WD=Q2438|lt=December 18}}) – {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|en|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|WD=Q1065163|lt=Ōuchi Yoshitaka}}, a daimyō (died {{ill|1819|en|1819|WD=Q6967|lt=1819}} {{ill|December 31|en|December 31|WD=Q2912|lt=December 31}}) – {{ill|Miyaji Tsunetoki|ja|宮地常磐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyaji Tsunetoki|1=Miyaji calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} {{ill|December 25|en|December 25|WD=Q2745|lt=December 25}}) – {{ill|Shiga Shigetaka|en|Shiga {{Not to be confused with|November 15|qq=November 15}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1614|en|1614|WD=Q6781|lt=1614}} {{ill|December 15|en|December 15|WD=Q2383|lt=December 15}}) – During the {{ill|Osaka Winter Campaign|ja|大坂冬の陣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Winter Campaign|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣|1=Siege of Osaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q475780}}, the army of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} set out to attack {{ill|Osaka Castle|en|Osaka Castle|WD=Q321242|lt=Osaka Castle}}. * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867}} {{ill|December 10|en|December 10|WD=Q2302|lt=December 10}}) – In the [[Ōmiya Incident]], both {{ill|Sakamoto Ryōma|en|Sakamoto Ryōma|WD=Q378450|lt=Sakamoto Ryōma}} and {{ill|Nakaoka Shintarō|en|Nakaoka Shintarō|WD=Q3138626|lt=Nakaoka Shintarō}} were attacked; Ryōma died on that day, and Shintarō died three days later. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|December 15|en|December 15|WD=Q2383|lt=December 15}}) – The {{ill|National Bank Ordinance|ja|国立銀行条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Bank Ordinance|1=National Bank Ordinance|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116982847}} was enacted. * In Meiji 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1872, 12月15日) – The year of the accession of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|WD=Q200188|lt=Emperor Jimmu}} was established as the Japanese era of {{ill|Kigen|en|Kigen|WD=Q21509043|lt=Kigen}} ({{ill|Japanese imperial year|en|Japanese imperial year|WD=Q1209728|lt=Japanese imperial year}}).
== Births == * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1507|en|1507|WD=Q6161|lt=1507}} {{ill|December 18|en|December 18|WD=Q2438|lt=December 18}}) – {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|en|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|WD=Q1065163|lt=Ōuchi Yoshitaka}}, a daimyō (died {{ill|1798|en|1798|WD=Q7823|lt=1798}} {{ill|January 1|en|January 1|WD=Q2150|lt=January 1}}) – {{ill|Utagawa Kuniyoshi|en|Utagawa Kuniyoshi|WD=Q317736|lt=Utagawa Kuniyoshi}}, an ukiyo-e artist (died {{ill|1819|en|1819|WD=Q6967|lt=1819}} {{ill|December 31|en|December 31|WD=Q2912|lt=December 31}}) – {{ill|Miyaji Tsunetoki|ja|宮地常磐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyaji Tsunetoki|1=Miyaji == Events == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1614|en|1614|WD=Q6781|lt=1614|1=1614}} {{ill|December 15|en|December 15|WD=Q2383|lt=December 15|1=December 15}}) – During the {{ill|Osaka Winter Campaign|ja|大坂冬の陣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Winter Campaign|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣|1=Siege of Osaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q475780}}, the army of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} set out to attack {{ill|Osaka Castle|en|Osaka Castle|WD=Q321242|lt=Osaka Castle|1=Osaka Castle}}. * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|December 10|en|December 10|WD=Q2302|lt=December 10|1=December 10}}) – In the [[Ōmiya Incident]], both {{ill|Sakamoto Ryōma|en|Sakamoto Ryōma|WD=Q378450|lt=Sakamoto Ryōma|1=Sakamoto Ryōma}} and {{ill|Nakaoka Shintarō|en|Nakaoka Shintarō|WD=Q3138626|lt=Nakaoka Shintarō|1=Nakaoka Shintarō}} were attacked; Ryōma died on that day, and Shintarō died three days later. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|December 15|en|December 15|WD=Q2383|lt=December 15|1=December 15}}) – The {{ill|National Bank Ordinance|ja|国立銀行条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Bank Ordinance|1=Q116982847|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116982847}} was enacted. * In Meiji 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1872, 12月15日) – The year of the accession of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|WD=Q200188|lt=Emperor Jimmu|1=Emperor Jimmu}} was established as the Japanese era of {{ill|Kigen|en|Kigen|WD=Q21509043|lt=Kigen|1=Kigen}} ({{ill|Japanese imperial year|en|Japanese imperial year|WD=Q1209728|lt=Japanese imperial year|1=Japanese imperial year}}).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1614|en|1614|WD=Q6781|lt=1614|1=1614}} {{ill|December 15|en|December 15|WD=Q2383|lt=December 15|1=December 15}}) – During the {{ill|Osaka Winter Campaign|ja|大坂冬の陣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Winter Campaign|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣|1=Siege of Osaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q475780}}, the army of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} set out to attack {{ill|Osaka Castle|en|Osaka Castle|WD=Q321242|lt=Osaka Castle|1=Osaka Castle}}. * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|December 10|en|December 10|WD=Q2302|lt=December 10|1=December 10}}) – In the [[Ōmiya Incident]], both {{ill|Sakamoto Ryōma|en|Sakamoto Ryōma|WD=Q378450|lt=Sakamoto Ryōma|1=Sakamoto Ryōma}} and {{ill|Nakaoka Shintarō|en|Nakaoka Shintarō|WD=Q3138626|lt=Nakaoka Shintarō|1=Nakaoka Shintarō}} were attacked; Ryōma died on that day, and Shintarō died three days later. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|December 15|en|December 15|WD=Q2383|lt=December 15|1=December 15}}) – The {{ill|National Bank Ordinance|ja|国立銀行条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Bank Ordinance|1=Q116982847|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116982847}} was enacted. * In Meiji 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1872, 12月15日) – The year of the accession of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|WD=Q200188|lt=Emperor Jimmu|1=Emperor Jimmu}} was established as the Japanese era of {{ill|Kigen|en|Kigen|WD=Q21509043|lt=Kigen|1=Kigen}} ({{ill|Japanese imperial year|en|Japanese imperial year|WD=Q1209728|lt=Japanese imperial year|1=Japanese imperial year}}).
